errors.couldNotLoad: Load nahi ho saka. Pull karke refresh karein.

landing.tagline: Apne business ke liye AI calling assistant
landing.subtitle: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali — 8 bhashayein. Ek baar setup, hazaron calls.
landing.feature1Body: Aapka assistant har caller ka naam jaanta hai aur unke context ke hisaab se baat karta hai.
landing.feature2Body: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Kannada, Marathi, Gujarati, English — sab mein.
landing.feature3Body: Ek baar setup karein, hazaron calls ek button se shuru karein. Real-time results dekhe.
landing.terms: Aage badhne ka matlab hai aap hamari Terms of Service aur Privacy Policy se sehmat hain.

login.title: MakeMyCall
login.subtitle:
Aapka AI phone secretary.
Apna number daalein aur shuru karein.
login.terms: Aage badhne ka matlab hai aap hamari Terms of Service aur Privacy Policy se sehmat hain
login.devSignIn: Test user ke roop mein sign in karein
login.devA11y: Test user ke roop mein sign in karein (sirf dev)
login.devNote:
Server-side mint ke through Firebase Phone Auth bypass karta hai.
Backend par ALLOW_DEV_LOGIN + FIREBASE_WEB_API_KEY chahiye.

alerts.errInvalidPhone: Yeh phone number sahi nahi lag raha.
alerts.errTooMany: Bahut zyada attempts. Kuch minute baad try karein.

otp.title: OTP verify karein
otp.subtitle:
Aapke phone par bheja gaya 6-digit code daalein
{{phone}}
otp.devHint:
Dev: Firebase test number use karein
+91 9999999999 → 123456

alerts.errWrong: Galat OTP. Phir se try karein.
alerts.errExpired: OTP expire ho gaya. Resend dabake naya lein.
alerts.sentBody: Naya OTP aapke phone par bhej diya gaya hai.

profileSetup.title: Apne baare mein bataiye
profileSetup.subtitle: Bas ek baar. Aage badhein home screen par.
profileSetup.businessDescPlaceholder: Main ek tuition center chalata hoon, Class 8-10, Hindi medium…
profileSetup.recordingHint: Ya bolke bataiye — apni awaaz record karein
profileSetup.recordingActive: Recording {{time}} — rokne ke liye tap karein
profileSetup.voiceFootnote: Awaaz Sarvam ko transcription ke liye bheji jaati hai. Audio store nahi hoti.
profileSetup.footnote: Aapka assistant abhi nahi banta — pehli call karte waqt taiyaar hoga.
profileSetup.useDifferentNumberBody: Naye number se phir se log in karna hoga.

alerts.micBody: Business description record karne ke liye microphone permission chahiye. Settings se enable kar sakte hain.
alerts.recordStartFailedBody: Phir se try karein, ya description type karein.
alerts.recordEmptyBody: Koi audio nahi mila. Phir se try karein.
alerts.tapHoldTitle: Tap karke hold karein bolne ke liye
alerts.tapHoldBody: Yeh recording bahut chhoti thi. Phir se try karein — kuch second tak naturally bolein.
alerts.couldntHearTitle: Aapki awaaz saaf nahi sunai di
alerts.couldntHearBody: Phir se try karein — thoda zor se bolein ya kahin shaant jagah par chalein.
alerts.transcribeFailedSuffix: Aap neeche type bhi kar sakte hain.
alerts.tellMoreBody: Apne business ke baare mein kuch line likh dein taaki hum aapke liye accha assistant bana sakein.

home.emptyBody: Har use case ke liye ek assistant. Fees, class cancel, naye batches.

campaigns.title: Calls
campaigns.emptyBody: Home screen se Make My Call use karein.

new.couldNotLoadFallback: Load nahi ho saka. Pull karke refresh karein.
new.couldNotCheckAssistant: Assistant ka status check nahi ho saka.
new.noContactsBody: Aapne abhi tak koi contact save nahi kiya. Pehle screenshot, paste, voice, ya phone book se contacts add karein.
new.pickAtLeastOne: Kam se kam ek contact chunein
new.callNowSub: Launch dabate hi shuru ho jayega
new.windowSub: Calls sirf in times ke beech mein hi jaayenge
new.windowHint: Hour likhein 8 ya 08 jaisa — hum HH:MM mein convert kar denge. Timezone: Asia/Kolkata.
new.windowError: End time start time se baad ka hona chahiye.
new.varsTitle: Sab ke saath share karne ke liye kuch hai?
new.varsSub: Optional. Yeh values is call list mein sabhi ke liye ek jaisi hoti hain — jaise common deadline ya location. Per-contact details (unka pending amount, last visit, etc.) automatically contact ki saved info se aate hain.

alerts.noAgentBody: Calls shuru karne se pehle apna AI assistant set up karein.
alerts.noContactsTitle: Call karne ke liye koi nahi
alerts.noContactsBody: Kam se kam ek contact chunein.
alerts.agentNotReadyBody: Thodi der baad phir se try karein.
alerts.needCreditsBody: In calls mein {{cost}} credits lagenge. Aapke paas {{balance}} hain.

detail.callsEmptyActive: Abhi tak koi calls nahi. Ho rahe hain abhi…

call.noTranscript: Koi transcript nahi — call connect nahi hui.

editProfile.title: Business profile edit karein
editProfile.subtitle: Yeh details home screen par dikhti hain aur agent ka tone tay karti hain. Yahan edit karne se naya agent nahi banta.
editProfile.descHint: Apne business ka chhota description. Agent isko customers se baat karte waqt context ke liye use karta hai.
editProfile.descPlaceholder: e.g. Main Bengaluru mein chhoti kirana store chalata hoon. Hum groceries aur household items bechte hain…

alerts.savedBody: Aapka business profile update ho gaya hai.

agents.title: Mere assistants
agents.emptyBody: Har calling use case ke liye ek banayein.

new.title: Naya assistant
new.heading: Yeh assistant kis kaam ke liye hai?
new.subtitle: Yeh assistant kya karega? Aapka business profile already saved hai — bas is assistant ka kaam batayein.
new.useCasePlaceholder: Main apne students ko call karna chahta hoon ki kal ki class cancel ho gayi hai…
new.voiceHint: Ya bolke bataiye — apni awaaz record karein
new.recordingActive: Recording {{time}} — rokne ke liye tap karein
new.voiceFootnote: Awaaz Sarvam ko transcription ke liye bheji jaati hai. Audio store nahi hoti.
new.exampleHeading1: Yeh assistant aapke liye kya karega
new.exampleHeading2: Kab aur kyun call karna hai

preview.loadFailed: Aapka assistant load nahi ho saka.
preview.failedFallback: Ek baar aur try karein — agar phir bhi nahi hua toh hum madad karenge.
preview.firstTimeNote: Pehli baar thoda time lagta hai. Aapka AI assistant set up ho raha hai…
preview.readyToCampaign: Aapki calls set up ho rahi hain…
preview.readyToHome: Aap home par wapas ja rahe hain…
preview.timedOut: Thoda aur waqt lag raha hai. Aap thodi der mein wapas aa sakte hain.
preview.loading: Aapka assistant load ho raha hai…
preview.ctaTestCall: Pehle ek test call try karein

tone.label: Tonality
tone.hint: Aapka assistant kaise baat karega. Tap karke kabhi bhi badlein.

voice.label: Voice
voice.hint: Apne assistant ki awaaz chunein — male, female, regional accents. Agle update mein.

testCall.title: Test call lagayein
testCall.subtitle: Aapka AI assistant abhi is number par call karega. Real calls shuru karne se pehle suniye kaisa lagta hai.
testCall.nameHint: Agent is naam se baat karega (
testCall.nameHintEnd: ke roop mein use hota hai).
testCall.phoneHint: 10-digit Indian number (hum +91 add kar denge), ya pura country code + ke saath daalein.
testCall.footnote: Ek tap par ek call. Daala gaya phone kuch second mein bajne lagega. Aapke business ke call rates ke according charges ho sakte hain.

alerts.phoneFormatBody: 10-digit Indian number daalein (hum +91 add kar denge), ya pura country code + ke saath daalein.
alerts.callingNowFallback: {{name}} ko {{phone}} par call ho rahi hai. Phone bajne ka wait karein.
alerts.testCallFailedFallback: Test call lagayi nahi ja saki. Phir se try karein.

edit.title: Contact edit karein
edit.notesPlaceholder: Aur kuch yaad rakhne layak — context, preferences, pichli baat.
edit.customFieldsHint: Apne hisaab se key/value pairs. Call script mein use hote hain (jaise pending: ₹2400).
edit.deleteBody: {{name}} aapke contacts se hat jayega. Pichli call history par koi asar nahi.
edit.notFoundBody: Shayad delete ho chuka hai. Vapis ja rahe hain.

contacts.anythingHint: e.g. pending amount, due date — ya skip karke neeche notes mein likhein.
contacts.notesHint: Free text. "udhaar 2400, bohot purana customer" works fine.
contacts.emptyBody: Pehla contact add karne ke liye + button dabaye

import.loading: Aapki phone book padh raha hoon…
import.search: Naam ya number se search karein
import.nothingNewTitle: Import karne ke liye kuch naya nahi
import.nothingNewBody: Aapke phone book ke saare contacts pehle se yahan saved hain.
import.pickToImport: Import karne ke liye contacts chunein

screen.title: Apne contacts add karein
screen.subtitle: Jin logon ko call karna hai unhe yahan le aayein.
screen.pasteHelper: Apni list paste karein — handwritten format, WhatsApp se copy, kuch bhi chalega.
screen.pastePlaceholder: Sharma ji 9876543210, Ramesh 8765432109 — 1500 baaki, Auntie ji 7654321098

photo.slotText: Photo ya screenshot daalne ke liye tap karein
photo.helper: Koi bhi image jismein naam aur number ho — handwritten register, diary ka page, paper list, laptop ki Excel sheet, business card, ya screenshot. Hum contacts nikal lenge.

voice.tapToStop: Rokne ke liye tap karein · {{seconds}}s baaki
voice.tapToRecord: Record karne ke liye tap karein · max {{seconds}}s

phoneMode.title: Phone contacts kholo
phoneMode.subtitle: Apne phone se laayein — agle screen par review karein.

picker.title: Contacts chunein
picker.loading: Aapki phone book padh raha hoon…
picker.searchPlaceholder: Naam ya number se search karein

review.emptyBody: Doosra mode try karein — paste, photo, ya voice.
review.skippedLabel: Inhe samajh nahi paaya — theek karein?

skippedReasons.uiText: App ka text lagta hai, contact nahi

review.rowsSkippedSuffix_one: {{count}} row jismein phone nahi hai skip ho jayegi.
review.rowsSkippedSuffix_other: {{count}} rows jinmein phone nahi hai skip ho jaayengi.

alerts.needTextBody: List paste karein — kuch toh likha ho.
alerts.couldNotReadListBody: Server ne parse reject kar diya. Chhota chunk try karein.
alerts.imagePickerUnavailableBody: Photo mode ke liye dev-client rebuild chahiye. Ek baar `npx expo run:android` (ya apna EAS dev build) chala kar phir try karein.
alerts.cameraPermissionBody: Camera permission denied — Settings se enable karein photo lene ke liye.
alerts.photosPermissionBody: Photos permission denied — Settings se enable karein gallery se chunne ke liye.
alerts.couldNotReadPhotoBody: Saaf photo try karein ya alag lighting mein lein.
alerts.micAccessBody: Microphone permission denied — Settings se enable karein list dictate karne ke liye.
alerts.recordingFailedNoAudioBody: Koi audio nahi mila. Phir se try karein.
alerts.tooShortBody: Recording bahut chhoti thi. Phir se try karein — kuch second tak naturally bolein.
alerts.couldntHearTitle: Aapki awaaz saaf nahi sunai di
alerts.couldntHearBody: Phir se try karein — thoda zor se bolein ya kahin shaant jagah par chalein.
alerts.couldNotProcessRecordingBody: Phir se try karein, ya Paste / Photo use karein.
alerts.contactsPermissionBody: MakeMyCall ko aapke contacts padhne ki permission chahiye. Settings kholke enable karein.
alerts.phoneBookEmptyBody: Is device par phone numbers wale koi contacts nahi mile.
alerts.pickAtLeastOneBody: Jin contacts ko import karna hai un par tap karein.
alerts.noContactsSaveBody: Save karne se pehle kam se kam ek contact add karein.
alerts.noContactsCallBody: Call karne se pehle kam se kam ek contact add karein.
alerts.phoneNumbersMissingBody: Har contact mein 10-digit phone chahiye. Theek karne ke liye row par tap karein.
alerts.rowsSkippedBody_one: {{count}} contact mein sahi phone nahi hai aur skip ho jaayega. Aage badhein?
alerts.rowsSkippedBody_other: {{count}} contacts mein sahi phone nahi hai aur skip ho jaayenge. Aage badhein?
alerts.contactsSavedBodyDuplicates_one: {{count}} contacts add hue, {{skipped}} duplicate skip hua
alerts.contactsSavedBodyDuplicates_other: {{count}} contacts add hue, {{skipped}} duplicates skip hue
alerts.missingAgentBody: Aapka assistant nahi mila. Wapas jaake phir se try karein.
alerts.couldNotCheckAgentBody: Assistant ka status check nahi ho saka.

alerts.requiredBody: Naam aur phone number zaroori hain.
alerts.pickAtLeastOneBody: Jin contacts ko import karna hai un par tap karein.

pasteNotes.title: Apne notes paste karein
pasteNotes.subtitle: Customer ke naam, phone numbers, aur har call kis baare mein hai paste karein. Hum structure kar denge — review karke add karein.
pasteNotes.placeholder:
Ramesh 9876543210 — pending payment 200
Sita 9988776655 - asked for monthly plan
baaki sab se 100
pasteNotes.aboutPlaceholder: Yeh call kis baare mein hai?
pasteNotes.tip: Tip: upar apne notes edit karein aur Re-parse dabaye, ya inko baad mein manually add kar lein.

alerts.couldNotParseBody: Server ne parse request reject kar di. Text ko chhote chunks mein todke try karein.
alerts.needPhoneBody_one: {{count}} row mein sahi 10-digit phone nahi hai. Theek karein, untick karein, ya aage badhne se pehle phone manually add karein.
alerts.needPhoneBody_other: {{count}} rows mein sahi 10-digit phone nahi hai. Theek karein, untick karein, ya aage badhne se pehle phones manually add karein.
